budgets.name: analysis
budgets.description: Analyze a small Compose project through the public facade.

budgets.name: planning
budgets.description: Create an execution plan from a small normalized project and empty snapshot.

budgets.name: snapshot_indexing
budgets.description: Build project-scoped lookup structures from observed resources.

budgets.name: convergence
budgets.description: Classify desired versus observed deployment state and emit decisions.

budgets.name: build_context_enumeration
budgets.description: Resolve a bounded build context and produce its deterministic manifest.

budgets.name: cli_startup
budgets.description: Start the CLI and render top-level help on a GitHub ubuntu-latest runner.

notes: Budgets are directional before 1.0 and intended to catch unexplained regressions.
Runner-to-runner timing noise is expected; regressions require review rather than automatic release rejection before the baseline stabilizes.
